title: TheZenithSword
description: Adding the Zenith Sword to Minecraft
body:
Crafting the Zenith Sword​

To craft the Zenith Sword, use the following materials in a crafting table.

once you get a netherite sword, the recipe is unlocked![oak_log,cobblestone,copper_block,iron_block,gold_block,diamond_block,netherite_block,enchanted_golden_apple,netherite_sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3bc2615ec2b84bdf930f1736185f660ed81d7fc.png)

Usage​

When you right‑click with the sword, it launches three flying blades:

• One is always the Zenith Sword itself.

• The other two are randomly chosen from all the swords that are used to craft it in Terraria.

Trajectory​

The flight range of the blades automatically adjusts based on the distance to the targeted enemy.

Configurable​

You can customize the Zenith Sword’s behavior through the mod’s configuration file:

• Set the base damage.

• Adjust the ranged damage multiplier.

• Toggle knockback on or off.

• Choose whether to prioritize distant enemies.

• Define separate minimum damage values for players and non‑player entities.
